description: Analyze shared laundry facility booking data to identify policy violators, calculate compliance metrics, and generate management recommendations. Create a summary sheet featuring aggregation formulas, conditional formatting, and sorted violation rankings. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/laundry_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You are a property manager analyzing shared laundry facility usage. Create a compliance summary that identifies residents with excessive no-shows (>25% rate), frequent overtime violations (>100 minutes in 90-minute slots), and slot hogging (3+ consecutive bookings). Calculate a violation score and provide recommendations.
